news.title: Global Market: Eurozone bond yields climb as Middle East tensions rekindle inflation concerns
news.description: Eurozone government bond yields climbed on Monday due to escalating US-Iran tensions. Oil prices surged significantly after Iran announced a closure of the Strait of Hormuz. This renewed conflict has increased concerns over global inflation and economic stability.

news.title: Nasdaq 100 tops 20-year returns at 21%; Nifty Midcap leads Indian markets: Which investment created more wealth?
news.description: The Nasdaq 100 emerged as the biggest long-term wealth creator over the last 20 years, with 21.3% returns. Among Indian equity benchmarks, the Nifty Midcap 150 TRI delivered the highest annualised return over the same period at 16.3%.
